textPlain: We find inspiration where we can / want to.  I've been guiding a vanity vibe coding project and watching what it can do.  I used to love assembly and did inline optmizations for crypto operations at a company I was at years back.  These days it's more - well, that's interesting, I don't have time, what can the Claude/Apu/etc tell me.
Or why robots are playing DOOM now. What programming for the Atari ST in 2025 has taught me.
